name: plugin-gauge
description: ElizaOS plugin — GAUGE: verifiable flood-risk, environmental, agriculture, power-grid, shipping & regulatory-filing signals for AI agents via x402 (USDC on Base, no API key). River water level/streamflow/flood stage (USGS/NOAA); air quality (AQI/PM2.5); precipitation/drought; agricultural drought (USDM) + heat/GDD + crop VHI (NOAA); power-grid demand (HDD/CDD) + renewables (solar/wind) + energy inflation (FRED); shipping route disruption (WMO sea state) + wave decomposition + live AIS vessel throughput; and corporate distress early-warning — 8-K material events + late-filing delinquency + Form 4 insider buy/sell (SEC EDGAR). Statistical anomaly + record_hash provenance.
author: AEML-DS Vanished-Data Exchange
